chunks.title: Keyframes and layered Actions
chunks.text: Use keyframe_insert for location/rotation. Blender 5.x Actions are layered; fcurves live in channelbags, not Action.fcurves. Clear with animation_data_clear. LINEAR for baked ballistics; BEZIER for camera.

chunks.title: Camera follow
chunks.text: TRACK_TO on camera to Empty target; track -Z up Y. Lead/lag target keyframes for cinematic follow. Animate lens on camera.data.

chunks.title: Studio area lights
chunks.text: AREA lights with large size for soft shadows. Key, fill, rim ratios. Aim local -Z at subject. world.set for ambient; world.hdri_set for HDRI.

chunks.title: Camera look-at and lens
chunks.text: Camera looks down -Z. look_at via to_track_quat(-Z,Y). camera.set supports track_to constraint and active scene camera.

chunks.title: Motion blur and FPS
chunks.text: render.use_motion_blur and shutter; eevee.use_motion_blur when available. Set fps and frame_start/end via render.set.
